mapper.sql: contract_item_id, contract_id, type, pay_no, status, total_amount, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM contract_item_info WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM contract_item_info WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM contract_item_info WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM contract_item_info ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE contract_item_info SET contract_id = #{contractId}, type = #{type}, pay_no = #{payNo}, status = #{status}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE contract_item_id = #{contractItemId}
